source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Adam and Bruna try to find out which is Carla's favorite figure, amongst the figures beside. Adam knows that Carla told Bruna what the shape of the figure was. Bruna knows that Carla told Adam what color the figure was. The following conversation takes place. Adam: "I don't know what Carla's favorite figure is and I know that Bruna doesn't know either". Bruna: "At first I didn't know what Carla's favorite figure was, but now I know". Adam: "Now I know too". What is Carla's favorite figure?
<image1>
<image2>

solving needs combining at least two attributes mentioned in the prompt: shape known to Bruna and color known to Adam
the task is not direct lookup; it requires iterative logical filtering over the set of shown figures
verifiability: the final answer is a single option label ('E'), which is easy to compare against a gold answer
verifiability is reduced because asset_registry_record lists image placeholder/path inconsistencies that may complicate exact reconstruction of the visual context
